name: MantleLens Wallet Guard
description: Scans Mantle wallet approvals, suspicious transfers, portfolio concentration, DeFi stub, and RWA/yield exposure with evidence-bound explanations.

skills.name: Scan Wallet Risk
skills.description: Return wallet risk score, top risks, evidence bundle, and trace for a Mantle demo fixture.

skills.name: Detect Approval Risk
skills.description: Return active approval risk items confirmed by allowance.

skills.name: Detect Suspicious Transfers
skills.description: Return suspicious recent transfer candidates from bounded known-token logs.

skills.name: Score Portfolio Exposure
skills.description: Return known-token portfolio concentration and Mantle yield exposure.

skills.name: Score RWA/Yield Risk
skills.description: Return USDY/mUSD/mETH/cmETH risk context where available.

skills.name: Build Evidence Bundle
skills.description: Return evidence items and evidence bundle hash for an assessment.

skills.name: Get Benchmark History
skills.description: Return local benchmark records for a wallet hash.
